title: LCP Ruby Presenter Definition
description: Schema for presenter metadata that defines UI configuration for a model — index table, show page, form, search, and actions. Presenters are defined in config/lcp_ruby/presenters/ as YAML files or via Ruby DSL.

name.description: Unique presenter identifier. Multiple presenters can reference the same model (e.g., 'employees' and 'employees_archived').

model.description: The model this presenter displays. Must match a model name from config/lcp_ruby/models/.

label.description: Human-readable title shown in navigation and page headers.

slug.description: URL slug for routing. Defaults to presenter name. Must be unique across all presenters.

icon.description: Icon name shown in navigation and page headers (Lucide icon names).

read_only.description: When true, hides create/edit/destroy actions regardless of permissions. Useful for archive or report views.

embeddable.description: When true, allows this presenter to be embedded in other pages (e.g., as an association list).

redirect_after.description: Override where the user is redirected after create/update actions.

empty_value.description: Text displayed for nil/empty field values on show and index pages. Overrides the engine-level default.

scope.description: Base query scope applied to all records in this presenter. 'discarded' shows only soft-deleted records; 'with_discarded' includes both.

condition.description: Condition for visible_when/disable_when: a field-based condition object ({field, operator, value}), a service reference object ({service, method}), or a method name string invoked on the record.

hidden_on.description: Hide the element on specific device sizes. Accepts a single value or array.

item_class_rule.description: A conditional CSS class rule for index rows/cards. When the condition matches, the CSS class is applied to the element.

class.description: One or more CSS class names (space-separated) to apply when the condition matches.

when.description: Condition evaluated against each record to determine if the class should be applied.

table_column.description: A column in the index table view.

field.description: Field name to display. Supports dot-path for associations (e.g., 'department.name') and template syntax (e.g., '{first_name} {last_name}').

label.description: Column header text. Falls back to humanized field name.

link_to.description: Make the cell value a link to this action (typically 'show').

sortable.description: Allow sorting by this column via clickable header.

renderer.description: Display renderer name from the RendererRegistry (e.g., badge, date, currency, email_link).

options.description: Options passed to the renderer (e.g., color_map for badge renderer).

partial.description: ERB partial path for fully custom cell rendering. Receives the record as a local.

pinned.description: Pin the column to the left or right edge of the table (stays visible during horizontal scroll).

summary.description: Show a summary row at the bottom of the table with the specified aggregation.

copyable.description: Show a copy-to-clipboard button next to the cell value.

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this column based on a field condition or service.

show_field.description: Field in show section. Regular field (has 'field' key), divider (type: divider), or info box (type: info).

field.description: Field name to display. Supports dot-path and template syntax.

partial.description: ERB partial for custom field rendering.

col_span.description: Number of grid columns this field spans (for multi-column section layouts).

copyable.description: Show a copy-to-clipboard button next to the value.

hint.description: Help text displayed below the field value.
examples: This value is calculated from the employee's base salary and bonus.

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this field based on a record condition.

type.description: Special field types: 'divider' renders a horizontal line, 'info' renders a text box.

text.description: Text content for type: info fields.

form_field.description: Field in form section. Regular input (has 'field' key), divider (type: divider), or info box (type: info).

field.description: Field name matching a model field or association FK.

input_type.description: Input widget type. Inferred from field type if omitted (e.g., text for string, select for enum, association_select for FK).

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in empty inputs.

autofocus.description: Automatically focus this input when the form loads. Only one field per form should have this.

prefix.description: Text or symbol shown before the input (e.g., currency symbol).

suffix.description: Text or symbol shown after the input (e.g., unit).

col_span.description: Number of grid columns this field spans.

hint.description: Help text displayed below the input.

readonly.description: Render the field as read-only (displayed but not editable).

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this field based on other form field values. Evaluated client-side for instant reactivity.

disable_when.description: Conditionally disable this field based on other form field values.

default.description: Default value pre-filled in the form for new records. Overrides the model-level default.

input_options.description: HTML attributes and widget-specific options for the input element.

options.description: Options passed to the renderer when the field uses a custom renderer instead of the default input.

renderer.description: Use a display renderer instead of an input widget (makes the field read-only in the form).

partial.description: ERB partial for fully custom input rendering.

type.description: Special types: 'divider' renders a horizontal line, 'info' renders a text box.

text.description: Text content for type: info fields.

show_section.description: Section in show page layout. Regular field section, association_list (embedded table of related records), json_items_list (items from a JSON column), or audit_history (change log).

section.description: Section title displayed as the heading. Also used as i18n key: lcp_ruby.presenters.<presenter>.sections.<section>.

type.description: Section type. Omit for regular field sections.

columns.description: Number of grid columns for field layout within this section.

description.description: Explanatory text shown below the section title.

responsive.description: Responsive column overrides per breakpoint (e.g., {mobile: 1, tablet: 2}).

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this entire section based on the record's field values.

fields.description: Fields displayed in this section (for regular and json_items_list sections).

sub_sections.description: Sub-sections for organizing fields into groups within a json_items_list or nested section.

association.description: For type: association_list — the association name on the model.

json_field.description: For type: json_items_list — the JSON column name containing the array of items.

target_model.description: For type: json_items_list — virtual model defining the field schema for each JSON item.

display_template.description: For type: association_list — template for rendering each item. Uses {field} interpolation.

link.description: For type: association_list — make each item a link to its show page.

sort.description: For type: association_list — default ordering of items.

limit.description: For type: association_list — maximum number of items to display.

empty_message.description: Message shown when no items exist.

scope.description: For type: association_list — named scope to apply when loading items.

form_section.description: Section in form layout. Regular section (title + fields) or nested_fields (editable association or JSON items).

title.description: Section heading. Also used as i18n key.

type.description: Set to 'nested_fields' for inline editing of associated records or JSON array items.

columns.description: Number of grid columns for field layout.

description.description: Explanatory text shown below the section title.

collapsible.description: Allow the section to be collapsed/expanded by clicking the title.

collapsed.description: Start the section in collapsed state. Only effective when collapsible: true.

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this section based on form field values.

disable_when.description: Conditionally disable all inputs in this section.

sub_sections.description: Sub-sections for organizing fields into titled groups within nested_fields.

association.description: For type: nested_fields with AR associations — the association name. Requires nested_attributes on the model.

json_field.description: For type: nested_fields with JSON columns — the JSON column name storing the array of items.

target_model.description: For type: nested_fields with JSON — virtual model defining field schema and validations for each item.

allow_add.description: For type: nested_fields — show an 'Add' button to create new items.

allow_remove.description: For type: nested_fields — show a 'Remove' button on each item.

min.description: For type: nested_fields — minimum number of items required.

max.description: For type: nested_fields — maximum number of items allowed.

add_label.description: For type: nested_fields — custom label for the 'Add' button.

empty_message.description: For type: nested_fields — message shown when no items exist.

sortable.description: For type: nested_fields — enable drag-and-drop reordering of items. Boolean true or a config object.

sub_section.description: Sub-section within nested_fields or json_items_list, grouping fields under a titled sub-heading.

columns.description: Number of grid columns for field layout within this sub-section.

disable_when.description: Conditionally disable all inputs in this sub-section.

action.description: A UI action button shown on index or show pages.

name.description: Action identifier. Built-in names: show, edit, destroy, create, update, restore, permanently_destroy.

type.description: 'built_in' for standard CRUD actions; 'custom' for host-app actions defined in app/actions/.

label.description: Button label text. Falls back to i18n lookup: lcp_ruby.actions.<name>.

icon.description: Lucide icon name for the action button.

confirm.description: Confirmation dialog before executing. true uses default message, string provides custom message, object limits confirmation to specific roles.

only.description: Only require confirmation for these roles.

examples: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

confirm_message.description: Custom confirmation dialog message (alternative to confirm: 'message').

visible_when.description: Conditionally show this action based on the record's field values.

search_filter.description: A predefined filter shown as a tab/chip above the index table. Activates a named scope on the model.

name.description: Filter identifier, usually matching a scope name.

label.description: Display label for the filter tab.

default.description: If true, this filter is active by default when the page loads.

scope.description: Scope name to activate. Defaults to the filter name if omitted.

default_sort.description: Default sorting applied to the index table on initial load.

tile_field.description: A field displayed in a tile card.

field.description: Field name to display. Supports dot-path for associations.

label.description: Label shown next to the field value.

tile_config.description: Configuration for tile card rendering in tiles layout.

title_field.description: Field to display as the card title. Required for tiles layout.

subtitle_field.description: Field to display as the card subtitle.

subtitle_options.description: Options passed to the subtitle renderer.

image_field.description: Field containing image URL or attachment for the card image zone.

description_field.description: Field for card description text, shown with line clamping.

description_max_lines.description: Maximum lines for description text before truncation.

columns.description: Number of tile columns in the grid.

card_link.description: Link target for the card title.

fields.description: Additional fields displayed as label-value pairs in the card.

sort_field_entry.description: A field available in the sort dropdown.

label.description: Display label in the sort dropdown.

summary_field.description: A field in the summary bar with an aggregate function.

label.description: Label displayed in the summary bar.

renderer.description: Display renderer for the aggregate value.

summary_config.description: Configuration for the summary bar displayed below the index content.

fields.description: Fields with aggregate functions to display in the summary bar.

layout.description: Index page layout mode. 'table' (default), 'tiles' for card grid, 'tree' for tree hierarchy.

reorderable.description: Enable drag-and-drop row reordering. Requires positioning on the model.

description.description: Explanatory text shown above the table.

per_page.description: Number of records per page (Kaminari pagination).

per_page_options.description: Selectable page sizes shown in a dropdown near pagination.

table_columns.description: Columns displayed in the index table.

sort_fields.description: Fields available in the sort dropdown (auto-derived for tiles if omitted).

row_click.description: Action triggered when clicking a table row.

empty_message.description: Message shown when no records match the current filters.

actions_position.description: Position of action buttons in table rows.

includes.description: Manual eager loading hints (AR includes). Auto-detected from presenter fields if omitted.

eager_load.description: Manual eager_load hints (uses LEFT OUTER JOIN). Use for associations that must always be loaded.

tree_view.description: Deprecated: use layout: tree instead. Enable tree-structured index view.

default_expanded.description: For tree layout: how many levels to expand by default. 0 means all collapsed, 'all' means fully expanded.

reparentable.description: For tree layout: allow drag-and-drop reparenting of tree nodes.

item_classes.description: Conditional CSS classes applied to each row/card element based on record field values. All matching rules accumulate.

description.description: Explanatory text shown at the top of the show page.

copy_url.description: Show a 'Copy URL' button in the toolbar for sharing direct links to this record.

layout.description: Ordered list of sections displayed on the show page.

includes.description: Manual eager loading hints for the show page.

eager_load.description: Manual eager_load hints for the show page.

description.description: Explanatory text shown above the form.

sections.description: Ordered list of form sections, each containing input fields.

includes.description: Manual eager loading hints for the edit form (e.g., for association selects).

eager_load.description: Manual eager_load hints for the edit form.

search_config.description: Configuration for quick search, predefined filters, and advanced filter builder.

enabled.description: Enable the search box on the index page.

searchable_fields.description: Fields included in quick search (text search across multiple fields).

placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the search input.

auto_search.description: Trigger search automatically as the user types (with debounce) instead of requiring Enter.

debounce_ms.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for auto_search.

min_query_length.description: Minimum number of characters before auto_search triggers.

default_scope.description: Named scope applied to all search queries as a base filter.

predefined_filters.description: Filter tabs shown above the search results.

advanced_filter_config.description: Configuration for the visual filter builder UI that lets users construct complex queries with multiple conditions.

enabled.description: Show the advanced filter builder button on the index page.

max_conditions.description: Maximum number of filter conditions a user can add.

max_association_depth.description: Maximum depth for filtering on associated model fields (e.g., 1 = direct associations only).

allow_or_groups.description: Allow users to create OR groups within the filter builder.

query_language.description: Enable the text-based query language input alongside the visual builder.

max_nesting_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for condition groups.

filterable_fields.description: Whitelist of fields available in the filter builder. If omitted, all readable fields are available.

filterable_fields_except.description: Blacklist of fields excluded from the filter builder.

field_options.description: Per-field customization of available filter operators. Keys are field names.

operators.description: List of operators available for this field.

presets.description: Pre-defined filter combinations that users can apply with one click.

label.description: Display label for the preset button.

conditions.description: Array of condition objects ({field, operator, value}) applied by this preset.

custom_filters.description: Custom filter widgets implemented as filter_* methods on the model.

name.description: Filter name matching a filter_<name> method on the model.

label.description: Display label in the filter UI.

type.description: Input type for the custom filter widget.

saved_filters_config.description: Configuration for user-saveable filter presets. Requires the saved_filters generator to create the backing model.

enabled.description: Enable the saved filters feature for this presenter.

display.description: How saved filters are displayed in the UI.

max_per_user.description: Maximum number of personal saved filters per user.

max_per_role.description: Maximum number of role-shared saved filters.

max_global.description: Maximum number of globally visible saved filters.

max_visible_pinned.description: Maximum number of pinned filters shown inline (overflow goes to dropdown).

allow_pinning.description: Allow users to pin saved filters for quick access.

allow_default.description: Allow users to set a saved filter as their personal default.

visibility_options.description: Which visibility levels are available when saving a filter.

actions_config.description: Action buttons grouped by context: collection (index page toolbar), single (per-record row actions), batch (multi-select actions).

collection.description: Actions shown in the index page toolbar (e.g., 'Create New').

single.description: Actions shown per record row on the index page and on the show page (e.g., 'Show', 'Edit', 'Delete').

batch.description: Actions available when multiple records are selected (e.g., 'Delete Selected', 'Export').
